name: morpheus
description: Morpheus is a research platform from North Star Systems Security Lab (NS3L).

scripts.setup: pnpm install && pnpm build:tools && pnpm run install:bin
scripts.setup:llbase: pnpm install && pnpm run build:tool:llbase && pnpm run install:bin
scripts.setup:llbic: pnpm install && pnpm run build:tool:llbic && pnpm run install:bin
scripts.setup:llcg: pnpm install && pnpm run build:tool:llcg && pnpm run install:bin
scripts.setup:buildroot: pnpm install && pnpm --filter @morpheus/buildroot build && pnpm run install:bin
scripts.setup:microkit-sdk: pnpm install && pnpm --filter @morpheus/microkit-sdk build && pnpm run install:bin
scripts.setup:qemu: pnpm install && pnpm --filter @morpheus/qemu build && pnpm run install:bin
scripts.setup:nvirsh: pnpm install && pnpm --filter @morpheus/nvirsh build && pnpm run install:bin
scripts.setup:sel4: pnpm install && pnpm --filter @morpheus/sel4 build && pnpm run install:bin
scripts.setup:libvmm: pnpm install && pnpm --filter @morpheus/libvmm build && pnpm run install:bin
scripts.setup:morpheus: pnpm install && pnpm --filter @morpheus/app build && pnpm run install:bin
scripts.build: pnpm run build:packages && pnpm run build:apps && pnpm run build:tools
scripts.build:packages: pnpm --filter @morpheus/core build && pnpm --filter @morpheus/schemas build && pnpm --filter @morpheus/tool-registry build && pnpm --filter @morpheus/workflows build
scripts.build:apps: pnpm --filter @morpheus/app build && pnpm --filter @morpheus/docs build && pnpm --filter @morpheus/runs-viewer build
scripts.build:tools: pnpm run build:tool:llbase && pnpm run build:tool:llbic && pnpm run build:tool:llcg && pnpm run build:tool:buildroot && pnpm run build:tool:microkit-sdk && pnpm run build:tool:qemu && pnpm run build:tool:nvirsh && pnpm run build:tool:sel4 && pnpm run build:tool:libvmm
scripts.build:tool:llbase: docker compose -f tools/llbase/docker-compose.yml build llbase llbase-mid llbase-legacy
scripts.test: pnpm --filter @morpheus/app test && pnpm --filter @morpheus/docs test && pnpm --filter @morpheus/runs-viewer test && pnpm --filter @morpheus/buildroot test && pnpm --filter @morpheus/microkit-sdk test && pnpm --filter @morpheus/qemu test && pnpm --filter @morpheus/nvirsh test && pnpm --filter @morpheus/sel4 test && pnpm --filter @morpheus/libvmm test
scripts.lint: pnpm --filter @morpheus/app lint && pnpm --filter @morpheus/docs lint && pnpm --filter @morpheus/runs-viewer lint && pnpm --filter @morpheus/buildroot lint && pnpm --filter @morpheus/microkit-sdk lint && pnpm --filter @morpheus/qemu lint && pnpm --filter @morpheus/nvirsh lint && pnpm --filter @morpheus/sel4 lint && pnpm --filter @morpheus/libvmm lint
